title: polypodium fraternum
intro: Polypodium fraternum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Polypodium fraternum include protection against skin damage from UV radiation, reduction of inflammation, and improvement of immune function. Polypodium fraternum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
